meaning: n.[生理][心]联觉,牵连感觉,共同感觉
examples: The artistic synaesthesia is a special way of sensation.
Synaesthesia is a linguistic and also a psychological phenomenon.
Pain synaesthesia may be a symptom of an abnormal, ongoing hypervigilance.
There have even been some cases where synaesthesia occurs after an injury to the brain.
As president of the UK Synaesthesia Association he meets many people with these types of abilities.
